entry.title: First Post
entry.summary: Well, time to publish the first post! This blog is made using the Pelican static site generator and the svbhack theme. The gist of what I'm trying to achieve with this site is to have a log of various small- and medium-size side projects I get into from time to …
entry.content:
Well, time to publish the first post! This blog is made using the Pelican static site generator and the svbhack theme. The gist of what I'm trying to achieve with this site is to have a log of various small- and medium-size side projects I get into from time to time; I have found out that if I don't explicitly analyze them, I tend to forget everything I've learned in the process.

While I take time to carefully check and test everything I put down in this blog, there is always the possibility of slipping up. If you find any mistakes, feel free to notify me - constructive feedback is greatly appreciated! This site has no comment system (yet), so until it does you can raise an issue in its repo.
